title: melicytus dentatus
intro: Melicytus dentatus, also known as New Zealand matipo or small-leaved matipo, is a small to medium-sized tree native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Melicytus dentatus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Melicytus dentatus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat minor ailments such as sore throats, colds, and skin irritations.
